message:
test: gracefully skip missing dist/ artifacts in extension conformance + add Bun shim rejection test

Two test improvements from concurrent agent work:

ext_conformance_generated.rs:
- Changed hard assert on entry file existence to graceful skip with eprintln
  diagnostic when the artifact is not found (e.g., dist/ excluded by rch
  sync). This matches the try_conformance behaviour and prevents spurious
  test failures on developer machines where rch excludes dist/ from sync.

franken_node_compat_harness.rs:
- Added node_detection_rejects_bun_node_shim_when_present() regression
  test that explicitly probes the Bun node shim at ~/.bun/bin/node (if
  present) and asserts is_real_node() returns false. Gracefully skips
  on machines without Bun installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
